PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; function Get-DocxText\($p\){ $zip=[System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($p\); $e=$zip.GetEntry\('word/document.xml'\); $sr=New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($e.Open\(\)\); $xml=$sr.ReadToEnd\(\); $sr.Close\(\); $zip.Dispose\(\); $t=[regex]::Replace\($xml,'</w:p>',"`n"\); $t=[regex]::Replace\($t,'<[^>]+>',''\); return [System.Net.WebUtility]::HtmlDecode\($t\) }; $f="C:\\FLAVIAN\\Asociația Chinologică CARAȘ-SEVERIN\\SITE\\De pus in folder CODE\\Necesar\\NECESAR.docx"; \(Get-DocxText $f\) -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_.Trim\(\) -ne '' } | Select-Object -First 120)

PowerShell($env:Path = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); $src = Join-Path $env:TEMP 'arbp-src'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $src | Out-Null; $A = "C:\\FLAVIAN\\Asociația Chinologică CARAȘ-SEVERIN\\SITE\\De pus in folder CODE\\Arbitrii"; Copy-Item "$A\\Mihail Sorin IACOB\\Mihail Sorin IACOB.png" "$src\\iacob.png" -Force; Copy-Item "$A\\Lionel Octavian ZOSMER\\Lionel Octavian ZOSMER.png" "$src\\zosmer.png" -Force; Copy-Item "$A\\Claudiu Martin CHIRA\\Claudiu Martin CHIRA.png" "$src\\chira.png" -Force; $work = Join-Path $env:TEMP 'necesar-docx'; Set-Location $work; & node arbphotos.js)

PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\FLAVIAN\\Asociația Chinologică CARAȘ-SEVERIN\\SITE\\De pus in folder CODE\\files"; $env:Path = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); $t = Measure-Command { $out = & npm run build 2>&1 }; \($out | Select-String -Pattern "page\\\(s\\\) built|Complete|ERROR|error" | Select-Object -Last 2\); "DURATA BUILD LOCAL: " + [math]::Round\($t.TotalSeconds,1\) + " s")
